caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters sits in a recording studio. He wears a gold chain and a watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five stars and the words "UNLOCK HUSTLE," as well as a sign that reads "BOSS" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT" is visible. A small logo in the bottom left corner reads "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and speaks, his facial expressions shifting slightly as he talks into the microphone, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
